source_pr.title: local: split job again when dynamic region
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #42484

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

When the estimated size of a job is larger than 2*96MB, try to split it into multiple jobs whose size is around 96MB

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [x] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

The 10GB data import task costs same time as TiKV turn off partioned-raft-kv

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: No concrete flaky failure signature is captured in this case; the PR is primarily a Lightning local-backend behavior change (splitting large jobs/ranges when dynamic region is enabled). The only explicit flaky-related signal captured here is a Bazel `race = "on"` metadata change.
failure_signature: Bazel metadata-only signal (`race = "on"`) with no concrete race report/log captured here
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR is mainly a refactor/behavior change in Lightning local backend job splitting (dynamic region handling). The case evidence here points to enabling Bazel `race = "on"`, which by itself is not a root-cause explanation unless accompanied by the actual race report and a focused fix. Keep this as insufficient evidence until the flaky signature (race output/CI log) is linked and the underlying concurrency issue is identified.
fix_pattern: Bazel metadata tweak (`race = "on"`) without a concrete race report/fix in the case evidence; keep as insufficient evidence until failing logs and a targeted fix are available.
analysis:
PR title: local: split job again when dynamic region
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/42485
Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal
Triage summary: race = "on",
Changed files (4): br/pkg/lightning/backend/local/engine.go, br/pkg/lightning/backend/local/local.go, br/pkg/lightning/backend/local/local_test.go, executor/seqtest/BUILD.bazel
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
